TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Losing Watan == Kapatay ni Losing Watan Losing Watan (1899 miheca 8 folad 16 romi'ad – 1954 miheca 4 folad 17 romi'ad), nai pikowan no Dipong a to'ek tangasa kahecalay katalawan a to'ek kakeridan pi;icayan no yincumin i Taywan. ​O mama ci Watan Shetu nano Tapao ngasaw no Tayal finacadan a kakitaan, o kakitaan no kasaniyaro' i lotolotokan, o mikeriday miliyangay "Tapao sangasaw lalood" to Dipong i 1900 miheca, ikor maenec no cikowangay micalap sifo no Dipong, mapatangic papidoedo, saka mapaenec palinah tayra i aniniay Fusin no Taoyun. O tadamaanay ci tanengay tamdaw no yincumin ​Kato'as ni Losing Watan itini i calay no Dipong a to'ek, o nanmo ni dipdipan no Dipong sifo i kaemangan ho, mapatayra i "pikiwikoan to kaemangay", ikor mapatayra haca i koritsu kakko papinanam to fa'elohay kiwiko. Orasaka tadamaan ko ninanaman itira, dotocen ko itiyaay ho o satadamaanay mitiliday no Taywan, mapatayra i Tayhok minanam to isingan, misawad i 1921 miheca itira i Taywan sotokufo ikakopo (aniniay Taywan daykako isingkakoyin). ​​Malepon ko pitilid minokay ci Losing Watan i niyaro' no Tayal padama, itira i Kaokang, Ciaopan san, Siangpi, Ciense a kasaniyaro' a malaising, mapatayra i niyaro' ko no aniniay isingan pipadama, kapolongan isi, padama to masofocay a sakafana', tadamaan ko kanga'ay saki niyaro' no yincuminco sakianiniay isingan a demak. ​​​O nano wawa no kakitaan i Tayal, tadamaanay cifenakay no yincuminco, caay ka dengan kalaising ni Losing Watan, mala nga'ayay todong kayakay no finawlan ato sifo no Dipong kalalicay. ​​​​I patodong no Sotokofo no Dipong, mikadafo i tadamaanay Hino laloma'an no Dipong ci Losing Watan, mararamod to Dipong a fafahiyan ci Aikoan i 1940 miheca, saka maocor mikihatiya to "kacedengan no kitakit 2600 mihecaan", o dengan dayhiw no "Katasako coko" i Taywan. ​​​​​I 1945 miheca itiya, matahidang ci Losing Watan mala mitomadaway laocan iing no Taywan sotokofo, o nihaydaan no sifo a kakeridan no yincuminco a tamdaw. O sarakatay onto no patiyolen ko sera no yincumin ​Ikor to no saka 2 lalood no hekal i, palieli sa ko KMT micalap mikowan to Tywan, awaay ko fenafenak a mikowan, saheto sa o mikelotay ko demak, oya nipatirengan i no kaDipongan to paisingan i kasaniyaro' no yincuminco sa'etal i, alaen no malatapangay mitakaw pa'aca, o iraay a kapolongan dafong maemin to maala, o sakatelii no finawlan no Tayal finacadan. ​​228 demak itiya, oya ci Losing Watan pasowal to finawlan tamdaw akaa pikihatiya to lalowadan, ikor ira koya dayhiw no Taywan yincumin ato KMT citodongay malalicay, midipot toya mikihatiyaay to 228 a malowaday kakeridan ci Uong'e Yatauyungana aci Yapasuyongʉ Yulunana a tatosa makari'ang a mapatay. ​​​Orasaka o mitahicay ko pakayraan, mala o KMT ci Losing Watan mamikahiday to kakeridan no yincumin. Nikawrora, o nano niparo'otan no mato'asay, pitahidang no niyaro', mateli i faloco' ni Losing Watan itiya. ​​​​Ikor to no 228, keriden ni Losing Watan ko finawlan tamdaw tayra i Taypisien cenfo mipatorod to salongoc, paini to pipatangic no Dipong tamdaw to finawlan a miliyas to paniyaro'an, nanay o fa'elohay sifo manga'ay paliyasen ko finawlan toya nano sera i Tapaosya a paniyaro'an. ​​​​​Talacowa, o salongoc a onto caay kalaheci, nika ira a mapalowan ko sarakatay no Taywan yncuminco a "Patiyolen ko sera ako a onto" sanay, mala o kemodan no pikapot to sician ni Losing Watan ko nian. Mipasadak to niyah pikowan no yincumin makinapatay i sakowan no KMT ​I 1948 miheca, mitahidang mala talicayan no Taywan sensifo ci Losing Watan itiya, ikor maala malacaniing, sarakatay lisi seniing, i sakowan no KMT i, o dengan dayhiw no yincumin to kafafaway dayhiw. ​​Citodong to kala seniing itiya i, milongoc to sifo saki mala kiwiko a masingsiay no yincumin, mifalic to sakacowat kicay i niyaro' no yincumin; micodah ko pilongoc saka tongal tamdaw no maladayhiway no yincuminco, milongoc to KMT sifo patiyol to malasawaday a sera to nano nialaan no Dipong a to'ek. ​​​Itini i kohecalay katalawan a mihecaan, o malaiingay no yincumin ci Losing Watan itiya, milongoc to saka cisalongoc no yincuminco, nanoyaan mala o kacaedesan no nengneng no KMT. Saka halafin ko pihokhok no misolapay ci Losing Watanan ato kakeridan no yincumin, miliyangay tamdaw to kacacofel naira. ​​​​Ikor sato, ca Losing Watan, Yapasuyongʉ Yulunana aci Uong'e Yatauyungana a kakeridan no yincuminco, nai pisakapot to "Takaci yiyah pikowan yofayof", mihapiw to o niyah yincuminco ko mikowanay sanay a onto, i 1952 miheca kolo o "Takacicoko a mikapotay to CCP" sanay ko nengneng pirepet no KMT, i 1954 miheca 4 folad 17 romi'ad patayen itiya. ​​​​Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay
S.PHON: == ɾo~usiŋ watan == kapataj ni ɾo~usiŋ watan ɾo~usiŋ watan (**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), nai piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uʡək taŋasa kaħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a to~uʡək kakəriɬ~ɮan pi;iʦajan no~u jinʦo~u~umin i tajwan. *o~u mama ʦi watan sħəto~u~u nano~u tapao~u ŋasaw no~u tajaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a kakitaan, o~u kakitaan no~u kasanijaro~uʡ i ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan, o~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj miɾijaŋaj "tapao~u saŋasaw ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ" to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i **** miħəʦa, iko~ur maənəʦ no~u ʦiko~uwaŋaj miʦaɾap sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, mapataŋiʦ papiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u, saka mapaənəʦ paɾinaħ tajra i aniniaj fo~u~usin no~u tao~ujo~u~un. o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦi tanəŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u jinʦo~u~umin *kato~uʡas ni ɾo~usiŋ watan itini i ʦaɾaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uʡək, o~u nanmo~u ni ɬ~ɮipɬ~ɮipan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ sifo~u i kaəmaŋan ħo~u, mapatajra i "pikiwiko~uan to~u kaəmaŋaj", iko~ur mapatajra ħaʦa i ko~uritso~u~u kakko~u papinanam to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj kiwiko~u. o~urasaka taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u ninanaman itira, ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦən ko~u itijaaj ħo~u o~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u tajwan, mapatajra i tajħo~uk minanam to~u isiŋan, misawaɬ~ɮ i **** miħəʦa itira i tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u ikako~upo~u (aniniaj tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u isiŋkako~ujin). **maɾəpo~un ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan i nijaro~uʡ no~u tajaɾ paɬ~ɮama, itira i kao~ukaŋ, ʦiao~upan san, siaŋpi, ʦiənsə a kasanijaro~uʡ a maɾaisiŋ, mapatajra i nijaro~uʡ ko~u no~u aniniaj isiŋan pipaɬ~ɮama, kapo~uɾo~uŋan isi, paɬ~ɮama to~u maso~ufo~uʦaj a sakafanaʡ, taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u kaŋaʡaj saki nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u sakianiniaj isiŋan a ɬ~ɮəmak. ***o~u nano~u wawa no~u kakitaan i tajaɾ, taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦifənakaj no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan kaɾaisiŋ ni ɾo~usiŋ watan, maɾa ŋaʡajaj to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kajakaj no~u finawɾan ato~u sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ kaɾaɾiʦaj. ****i pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u so~uto~uko~ufo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, mikaɬ~ɮafo~u i taɬ~ɮamaanaj ħino~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan, mararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a fafaħijan ʦi aiko~uan i **** miħəʦa, saka mao~uʦo~ur mikiħatija to~u "kaʦəɬ~ɮəŋan no~u kitakit **** miħəʦaan", o~u ɬ~ɮəŋan ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u "katasako~u ʦo~uko~u" i tajwan. *****i **** miħəʦa itija, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan maɾa mito~umaɬ~ɮawaj ɾao~uʦan iiŋ no~u tajwan so~uto~uko~ufo~u, o~u niħajɬ~ɮaan no~u sifo~u a kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sarakataj o~unto~u no~u patijo~uɾən ko~u səra no~u jinʦo~u~umin *iko~ur to~u no~u saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ i, paɾiəɾi sa ko~u kmt miʦaɾap miko~uwan to~u tjwan, awaaj ko~u fənafənak a miko~uwan, saħəto~u sa o~u mikəɾo~utaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, o~uja nipatirəŋan i no~u kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan to~u paisiŋan i kasanijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saʡətaɾ i, aɾaən no~u maɾatapaŋaj mitakaw paʡaʦa, o~u iraaj a kapo~uɾo~uŋan ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ maəmin to~u maaɾa, o~u sakatəɾii no~u finawɾan no~u tajaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan. ***** ɬ~ɮəmak itija, o~uja ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan paso~uwaɾ to~u finawɾan tamɬ~ɮaw akaa pikiħatija to~u ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan, iko~ur ira ko~uja ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u tajwan jinʦo~u~umin ato~u kmt ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj maɾaɾiʦaj, miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~uja mikiħatijaaj to~u *** a maɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi o~u~uo~uŋʡə jatao~u~ujo~u~uŋana aʦi japaso~u~ujo~uŋ* jo~u~uɾo~u~unana a tato~usa makariʡaŋ a mapataj. ***o~urasaka o~u mitaħiʦaj ko~u pakajraan, maɾa o~u kmt ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan mamikaħiɬ~ɮaj to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin. nikawro~ura, o~u nano~u niparo~uʡo~utan no~u mato~uʡasaj, pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u nijaro~uʡ, matəɾi i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni ɾo~usiŋ watan itija. ****iko~ur to~u no~u ***, kəriɬ~ɮən ni ɾo~usiŋ watan ko~u finawɾan tamɬ~ɮaw tajra i tajpisiən ʦənfo~u mipato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, paini to~u pipataŋiʦ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw to~u finawɾan a miɾijas to~u panijaro~uʡan, nanaj o~u faʡəɾo~uħaj sifo~u maŋaʡaj paɾijasən ko~u finawɾan to~uja nano~u səra i tapao~usja a panijaro~uʡan. *****taɾaʦo~uwa, o~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a o~unto~u ʦaaj kaɾaħəʦi, nika ira a mapaɾo~uwan ko~u sarakataj no~u tajwan jnʦo~u~uminʦo~u a "patijo~uɾən ko~u səra ako~u a o~unto~u" sanaj, maɾa o~u kəmo~uɬ~ɮan no~u pikapo~ut to~u siʦian ni ɾo~usiŋ watan ko~u nian. mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u nijaħ piko~uwan no~u jinʦo~u~umin makinapataj i sako~uwan no~u kmt *i **** miħəʦa, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ maɾa taɾiʦajan no~u tajwan sənsifo~u ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan itija, iko~ur maaɾa maɾaʦaniiŋ, sarakataj ɾisi səniiŋ, i sako~uwan no~u kmt i, o~u ɬ~ɮəŋan ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u kafafawaj ɬ~ɮajħiw. **ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kaɾa səniiŋ itija i, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sifo~u saki maɾa kiwiko~u a masiŋsiaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin, mifaɾiʦ to~u sakaʦo~uwat kiʦaj i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin; miʦo~uɬ~ɮaħ ko~u piɾo~uŋo~uʦ saka to~uŋaɾ tamɬ~ɮaw no~u maɾaɬ~ɮajħiwaj no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u kmt sifo~u patijo~uɾ to~u maɾasawaɬ~ɮaj a səra to~u nano~u niaɾaan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uʡək. ***itini i ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a miħəʦaan, o~u maɾaiiŋaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan itija, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u saka ʦisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, nano~ujaan maɾa o~u kaʦaəɬ~ɮəsan no~u nəŋnəŋ no~u kmt. saka ħaɾafin ko~u piħo~ukħo~uk no~u miso~uɾapaj ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watanan ato~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, miɾijaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾ naira. ****iko~ur sato~u, ʦa ɾo~usiŋ watan, japaso~u~ujo~uŋ* jo~u~uɾo~u~unana aʦi o~u~uo~uŋʡə jatao~u~ujo~u~uŋana a kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, nai pisakapo~ut to~u "takaʦi jijaħ piko~uwan jo~ufajo~uf", miħapiw to~u o~u nijaħ jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ko~u miko~uwanaj sanaj a o~unto~u, i **** miħəʦa ko~uɾo~u o~u "takaʦiʦo~uko~u a mikapo~utaj to~u ʦʦp" sanaj ko~u nəŋnəŋ pirəpət no~u kmt, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ patajən itija. ****sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj
S.FORM: == Losing Watan == Kapatay ni Losing Watan Losing Watan (1899 miheca 8 folad 16 romi'ad – 1954 miheca 4 folad 17 romi'ad), nai pikowan no Dipong a to'ek tangasa kahecalay katalawan a to'ek kakeridan pi;icayan no yincumin i Taywan. ​O mama ci Watan Shetu nano Tapao ngasaw no Tayal finacadan a kakitaan, o kakitaan no kasaniyaro' i lotolotokan, o mikeriday miliyangay "Tapao sangasaw lalood" to Dipong i 1900 miheca, ikor maenec no cikowangay micalap sifo no Dipong, mapatangic papidoedo, saka mapaenec palinah tayra i aniniay Fusin no Taoyun. O tadamaanay ci tanengay tamdaw no yincumin ​Kato'as ni Losing Watan itini i calay no Dipong a to'ek, o nanmo ni dipdipan no Dipong sifo i kaemangan ho, mapatayra i "pikiwikoan to kaemangay", ikor mapatayra haca i koritsu kakko papinanam to fa'elohay kiwiko. Orasaka tadamaan ko ninanaman itira, dotocen ko itiyaay ho o satadamaanay mitiliday no Taywan, mapatayra i Tayhok minanam to isingan, misawad i 1921 miheca itira i Taywan sotokufo ikakopo (aniniay Taywan daykako isingkakoyin). ​​Malepon ko pitilid minokay ci Losing Watan i niyaro' no Tayal padama, itira i Kaokang, Ciaopan san, Siangpi, Ciense a kasaniyaro' a malaising, mapatayra i niyaro' ko no aniniay isingan pipadama, kapolongan isi, padama to masofocay a sakafana', tadamaan ko kanga'ay saki niyaro' no yincuminco sakianiniay isingan a demak. ​​​O nano wawa no kakitaan i Tayal, tadamaanay cifenakay no yincuminco, caay ka dengan kalaising ni Losing Watan, mala nga'ayay todong kayakay no finawlan ato sifo no Dipong kalalicay. ​​​​I patodong no Sotokofo no Dipong, mikadafo i tadamaanay Hino laloma'an no Dipong ci Losing Watan, mararamod to Dipong a fafahiyan ci Aikoan i 1940 miheca, saka maocor mikihatiya to "kacedengan no kitakit 2600 mihecaan", o dengan dayhiw no "Katasako coko" i Taywan. ​​​​​I 1945 miheca itiya, matahidang ci Losing Watan mala mitomadaway laocan iing no Taywan sotokofo, o nihaydaan no sifo a kakeridan no yincuminco a tamdaw. O sarakatay onto no patiyolen ko sera no yincumin ​Ikor to no saka 2 lalood no hekal i, palieli sa ko KMT micalap mikowan to Tywan, awaay ko fenafenak a mikowan, saheto sa o mikelotay ko demak, oya nipatirengan i no kaDipongan to paisingan i kasaniyaro' no yincuminco sa'etal i, alaen no malatapangay mitakaw pa'aca, o iraay a kapolongan dafong maemin to maala, o sakatelii no finawlan no Tayal finacadan. ​​228 demak itiya, oya ci Losing Watan pasowal to finawlan tamdaw akaa pikihatiya to lalowadan, ikor ira koya dayhiw no Taywan yincumin ato KMT citodongay malalicay, midipot toya mikihatiyaay to 228 a malowaday kakeridan ci Uong'e Yatauyungana aci Yapasuyongʉ Yulunana a tatosa makari'ang a mapatay. ​​​Orasaka o mitahicay ko pakayraan, mala o KMT ci Losing Watan mamikahiday to kakeridan no yincumin. Nikawrora, o nano niparo'otan no mato'asay, pitahidang no niyaro', mateli i faloco' ni Losing Watan itiya. ​​​​Ikor to no 228, keriden ni Losing Watan ko finawlan tamdaw tayra i Taypisien cenfo mipatorod to salongoc, paini to pipatangic no Dipong tamdaw to finawlan a miliyas to paniyaro'an, nanay o fa'elohay sifo manga'ay paliyasen ko finawlan toya nano sera i Tapaosya a paniyaro'an. ​​​​​Talacowa, o salongoc a onto caay kalaheci, nika ira a mapalowan ko sarakatay no Taywan yncuminco a "Patiyolen ko sera ako a onto" sanay, mala o kemodan no pikapot to sician ni Losing Watan ko nian. Mipasadak to niyah pikowan no yincumin makinapatay i sakowan no KMT ​I 1948 miheca, mitahidang mala talicayan no Taywan sensifo ci Losing Watan itiya, ikor maala malacaniing, sarakatay lisi seniing, i sakowan no KMT i, o dengan dayhiw no yincumin to kafafaway dayhiw. ​​Citodong to kala seniing itiya i, milongoc to sifo saki mala kiwiko a masingsiay no yincumin, mifalic to sakacowat kicay i niyaro' no yincumin; micodah ko pilongoc saka tongal tamdaw no maladayhiway no yincuminco, milongoc to KMT sifo patiyol to malasawaday a sera to nano nialaan no Dipong a to'ek. ​​​Itini i kohecalay katalawan a mihecaan, o malaiingay no yincumin ci Losing Watan itiya, milongoc to saka cisalongoc no yincuminco, nanoyaan mala o kacaedesan no nengneng no KMT. Saka halafin ko pihokhok no misolapay ci Losing Watanan ato kakeridan no yincumin, miliyangay tamdaw to kacacofel naira. ​​​​Ikor sato, ca Losing Watan, Yapasuyongʉ Yulunana aci Uong'e Yatauyungana a kakeridan no yincuminco, nai pisakapot to "Takaci yiyah pikowan yofayof", mihapiw to o niyah yincuminco ko mikowanay sanay a onto, i 1952 miheca kolo o "Takacicoko a mikapotay to CCP" sanay ko nengneng pirepet no KMT, i 1954 miheca 4 folad 17 romi'ad patayen itiya. ​​​​Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay
S.PHON: == ɾo~usiŋ watan == kapataj ni ɾo~usiŋ watan ɾo~usiŋ watan (**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ), nai piko~uwan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uʡək taŋasa kaħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a to~uʡək kakəriɬ~ɮan pi;iʦajan no~u jinʦo~u~umin i tajwan. *o~u mama ʦi watan sħəto~u~u nano~u tapao~u ŋasaw no~u tajaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan a kakitaan, o~u kakitaan no~u kasanijaro~uʡ i ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan, o~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj miɾijaŋaj "tapao~u saŋasaw ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ" to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i **** miħəʦa, iko~ur maənəʦ no~u ʦiko~uwaŋaj miʦaɾap sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, mapataŋiʦ papiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u, saka mapaənəʦ paɾinaħ tajra i aniniaj fo~u~usin no~u tao~ujo~u~un. o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦi tanəŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u jinʦo~u~umin *kato~uʡas ni ɾo~usiŋ watan itini i ʦaɾaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uʡək, o~u nanmo~u ni ɬ~ɮipɬ~ɮipan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ sifo~u i kaəmaŋan ħo~u, mapatajra i "pikiwiko~uan to~u kaəmaŋaj", iko~ur mapatajra ħaʦa i ko~uritso~u~u kakko~u papinanam to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj kiwiko~u. o~urasaka taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u ninanaman itira, ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦən ko~u itijaaj ħo~u o~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u tajwan, mapatajra i tajħo~uk minanam to~u isiŋan, misawaɬ~ɮ i **** miħəʦa itira i tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u ikako~upo~u (aniniaj tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u isiŋkako~ujin). **maɾəpo~un ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ mino~ukaj ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan i nijaro~uʡ no~u tajaɾ paɬ~ɮama, itira i kao~ukaŋ, ʦiao~upan san, siaŋpi, ʦiənsə a kasanijaro~uʡ a maɾaisiŋ, mapatajra i nijaro~uʡ ko~u no~u aniniaj isiŋan pipaɬ~ɮama, kapo~uɾo~uŋan isi, paɬ~ɮama to~u maso~ufo~uʦaj a sakafanaʡ, taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u kaŋaʡaj saki nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u sakianiniaj isiŋan a ɬ~ɮəmak. ***o~u nano~u wawa no~u kakitaan i tajaɾ, taɬ~ɮamaanaj ʦifənakaj no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan kaɾaisiŋ ni ɾo~usiŋ watan, maɾa ŋaʡajaj to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kajakaj no~u finawɾan ato~u sifo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ kaɾaɾiʦaj. ****i pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u so~uto~uko~ufo~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, mikaɬ~ɮafo~u i taɬ~ɮamaanaj ħino~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan, mararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a fafaħijan ʦi aiko~uan i **** miħəʦa, saka mao~uʦo~ur mikiħatija to~u "kaʦəɬ~ɮəŋan no~u kitakit **** miħəʦaan", o~u ɬ~ɮəŋan ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u "katasako~u ʦo~uko~u" i tajwan. *****i **** miħəʦa itija, mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan maɾa mito~umaɬ~ɮawaj ɾao~uʦan iiŋ no~u tajwan so~uto~uko~ufo~u, o~u niħajɬ~ɮaan no~u sifo~u a kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sarakataj o~unto~u no~u patijo~uɾən ko~u səra no~u jinʦo~u~umin *iko~ur to~u no~u saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ i, paɾiəɾi sa ko~u kmt miʦaɾap miko~uwan to~u tjwan, awaaj ko~u fənafənak a miko~uwan, saħəto~u sa o~u mikəɾo~utaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, o~uja nipatirəŋan i no~u kaɬ~ɮipo~uŋan to~u paisiŋan i kasanijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saʡətaɾ i, aɾaən no~u maɾatapaŋaj mitakaw paʡaʦa, o~u iraaj a kapo~uɾo~uŋan ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ maəmin to~u maaɾa, o~u sakatəɾii no~u finawɾan no~u tajaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan. ***** ɬ~ɮəmak itija, o~uja ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan paso~uwaɾ to~u finawɾan tamɬ~ɮaw akaa pikiħatija to~u ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan, iko~ur ira ko~uja ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u tajwan jinʦo~u~umin ato~u kmt ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj maɾaɾiʦaj, miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~uja mikiħatijaaj to~u *** a maɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi o~u~uo~uŋʡə jatao~u~ujo~u~uŋana aʦi japaso~u~ujo~uŋ* jo~u~uɾo~u~unana a tato~usa makariʡaŋ a mapataj. ***o~urasaka o~u mitaħiʦaj ko~u pakajraan, maɾa o~u kmt ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan mamikaħiɬ~ɮaj to~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin. nikawro~ura, o~u nano~u niparo~uʡo~utan no~u mato~uʡasaj, pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ no~u nijaro~uʡ, matəɾi i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ ni ɾo~usiŋ watan itija. ****iko~ur to~u no~u ***, kəriɬ~ɮən ni ɾo~usiŋ watan ko~u finawɾan tamɬ~ɮaw tajra i tajpisiən ʦənfo~u mipato~uro~uɬ~ɮ to~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, paini to~u pipataŋiʦ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ tamɬ~ɮaw to~u finawɾan a miɾijas to~u panijaro~uʡan, nanaj o~u faʡəɾo~uħaj sifo~u maŋaʡaj paɾijasən ko~u finawɾan to~uja nano~u səra i tapao~usja a panijaro~uʡan. *****taɾaʦo~uwa, o~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a o~unto~u ʦaaj kaɾaħəʦi, nika ira a mapaɾo~uwan ko~u sarakataj no~u tajwan jnʦo~u~uminʦo~u a "patijo~uɾən ko~u səra ako~u a o~unto~u" sanaj, maɾa o~u kəmo~uɬ~ɮan no~u pikapo~ut to~u siʦian ni ɾo~usiŋ watan ko~u nian. mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u nijaħ piko~uwan no~u jinʦo~u~umin makinapataj i sako~uwan no~u kmt *i **** miħəʦa, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ maɾa taɾiʦajan no~u tajwan sənsifo~u ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan itija, iko~ur maaɾa maɾaʦaniiŋ, sarakataj ɾisi səniiŋ, i sako~uwan no~u kmt i, o~u ɬ~ɮəŋan ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u kafafawaj ɬ~ɮajħiw. **ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kaɾa səniiŋ itija i, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sifo~u saki maɾa kiwiko~u a masiŋsiaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin, mifaɾiʦ to~u sakaʦo~uwat kiʦaj i nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin; miʦo~uɬ~ɮaħ ko~u piɾo~uŋo~uʦ saka to~uŋaɾ tamɬ~ɮaw no~u maɾaɬ~ɮajħiwaj no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u kmt sifo~u patijo~uɾ to~u maɾasawaɬ~ɮaj a səra to~u nano~u niaɾaan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uʡək. ***itini i ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a miħəʦaan, o~u maɾaiiŋaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watan itija, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u saka ʦisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, nano~ujaan maɾa o~u kaʦaəɬ~ɮəsan no~u nəŋnəŋ no~u kmt. saka ħaɾafin ko~u piħo~ukħo~uk no~u miso~uɾapaj ʦi ɾo~usiŋ watanan ato~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, miɾijaŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾ naira. ****iko~ur sato~u, ʦa ɾo~usiŋ watan, japaso~u~ujo~uŋ* jo~u~uɾo~u~unana aʦi o~u~uo~uŋʡə jatao~u~ujo~u~uŋana a kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, nai pisakapo~ut to~u "takaʦi jijaħ piko~uwan jo~ufajo~uf", miħapiw to~u o~u nijaħ jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u ko~u miko~uwanaj sanaj a o~unto~u, i **** miħəʦa ko~uɾo~u o~u "takaʦiʦo~uko~u a mikapo~utaj to~u ʦʦp" sanaj ko~u nəŋnəŋ pirəpət no~u kmt, i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ patajən itija. ****sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj
